discrepancies.secondary: Must-Visit Steakhouse in Grandville, MI | Sakura

primary: Sushi & Sashimi — Artfully prepared raw fish and seafood, expertly crafted into traditional rolls, nigiri, and delicate sashimi slices.
Hibachi Grill — An exciting interactive dining experience where skilled chefs cook your chosen meats and vegetables right at your table.
Teriyaki & Tempura — Classic Japanese dishes featuring grilled meats glazed with sweet savory teriyaki sauce and lightly battered, deep-fried items.
secondary: Choose us for your next special occasion or get-together. — Got a birthday party, rehearsal dinner, corporate or other event coming up? We're a great option for your gathering! Inquire today and let us know how we can make your special occasion perfect!
Let’s ensure you get a great table: Book today! — We recommend making a reservation ahead of time. Book your table today!
Did you know we do catering?
Whatever your occasion, however big or small, we have the perfect options to choose from. — Cater your birthday party, holiday party, corporate events, wedding festivities and more!
Dine Together, Celebrate Together — Bring your group to Sakura for a culinary experience like no other. Our private dining options and tailored menus ensure every guest leaves happy.
Authentic Japanese Flavors To Go — Satisfy your cravings with Sakura's authentic Japanese flavors delivered straight to your door. Order online now and enjoy restaurant-quality dining at home!
